Developer

Passionate about building scalable and performant web applications using modern technologies.

Hi! I'm Alex Johnson, a creative developer and designer based in San Francisco, CA. I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful solutions.

With over 3 years of experience, I've worked on everything from small business websites to large-scale enterprise applications.
